response.justification: Although Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in distributed systems, web technologies, and test-driven development, he lacks the recent and extensive C++ expertise required for this role. The position explicitly demands an experienced C++ developer with knowledge of industrial automation protocols and IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards, whereas his recent stack revolves around Node.js, TypeScript, and Dlang, making him a poor fit for these specific core technical requirements.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (20+ years) with a strong focus on distributed systems, microservices, and event-driven architectures.
Demonstrated leadership and mentorship abilities, having organized workshops, coding dojos, and technical training sessions.
Possesses advantageous skills listed in the job description, including Node.js, React, and modern cloud/infrastructure technologies.
concerns: Severe lack of recent C++ and STL experience; the only listed C++ professional role was a brief stint over two decades ago.
No demonstrated experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA) or industrial IoT concepts.
Lacks exposure to secure engineering practices within industrial environments, specifically the required IEC 62443 standards.
